decisions.rationale: Observation is NYC DOT agency. Registry record entity_nyc-dot is exactly New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT). Same entity name and entity_type=agency. Source explicitly states NYCDOT led the meeting. Evidence: p001_c0006 says 'The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT)' and p001_c0007 identifies Charles Ukegbu as 'NYCDOT Deputy Borough Commissioner for the Bronx.' Link to entity_nyc-dot.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Monday, February 6, 2012, The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT), held the first Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting

decisions.rationale: Observation is MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) agency. Registry record entity_mta-nyct has entity_name='MTA New York City Transit' and entity_type='agency'. Same entity name and type. Source p001_c0006 mentions both NYCDOT and 'MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)'. Base record is already entity_mta-nyct.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)

decisions.rationale: Observation is Eric Beaton, Director of Transit Development for NYCDOT. Registry record entity_eric-beaton-20100921 has payload entity_name='Eric Beaton' and entity_type='person' from same source. Aliases include 'entity_eric-beaton-2012-02-brt-webster-cac1' which matches the observation exactly. Same person across multiple CAC meetings in this source.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Mr. Ukegbu then introduced Eric Beaton, Director of Transit Development for NYCDOT

decisions.rationale: Observation is Ted Orosz, Director of Long Range Bus Planning for NYCT. Registry record entity_ted-orosz-20100921 has entity_name='Ted Orosz', entity_type='person', and aliases include 'entity_ted-orosz-2012-02-brt-webster-cac1' matching this observation. evidence_refs.source_quote: Eric Beaton and Ted Orosz, Director of Long Range Bus Planning for NYCT, then presented a more detailed overview

decisions.rationale: Observation's base record is already entity_charles-ukegbu-2012-02-brt-webster-cac1, which is the same as entity_charles-ukegbu-2012-02-brt-webster-cac1 in the registry. Same record: Charles Ukegbu is mentioned as NYCDOT Deputy Borough Commissioner for the Bronx at this meeting. The record_id field is a relation key, but the base_record confirms this is the same entity.

decisions.rationale: Observation's own base_record_id is already entity_ruben-diaz-jr-2012-02-brt-webster-cac1. This is the existing registry record for Ruben Diaz, Jr. The observation is already pointing to itself.
